title: The Local Choice Pharmacy now in George
description: GEORGE NEWS - With numerous new businesses...
bodyText:
Advertorial

GEORGE NEWS - With numerous new businesses cropping up in and around George, making choices can seem daunting. However, when it comes to your health and wellness, the choice is clear.

The pharmaceutical landscape has recently seen a significant expansion when the CY Group, a local group, saw the need for a The Local Choice Pharmacy in the area.

This was marked by the grand opening of The Local Choice Pharmacy in Courtenay Street, and while offering a fresh approach to healthcare, they are here to prioritise your well-being like never before.


> Step into wellness


The Local Choice health care team, headed by pharmacist Jacques Papenfus and Sr Louise Steyn, is thrilled to welcome you with open arms and meet all your medication and pharmacy needs without breaking the bank.

Experience top-notch pharmaceutical care from their friendly staff today – your wellness journey starts here.


> Your trusted health allies


The Local Choice is a premier franchise within the national pharmaceutical industry, boasting branches with a reputation for excellence across the country.

Here you get more than just medication experts and with extensive knowledge and a commitment to fostering community well-being, they're here to provide personalised advice and support for your unique needs.

Whether it's expert medical guidance, vaccination services, weight-loss support, or blood pressure monitoring, they're here to support your journey to better health every step of the way.


> In safe hands


Pharmacist Jacques Papenfus leads the team with a BPharm degree from the North West University, marking the start of a lifelong commitment to healthcare excellence. Focusing on courses relating to primary care drug therapy, immunisation, injection techniques, and the Pharmacist-Initiated Management of Antiretroviral Therapy, Jacques has fortified his expertise in drug therapy and chronic condition management.

With a tenure of 30 years in community pharmacy management, Jacques has exemplified leadership that prioritises patient care. His management philosophy has transformed community pharmacies under his leadership into pharmacies where the community finds not just medication, but support, advice and compassion.


> This extensive experience in management highlights Jacques's adaptability and foresight in meeting the evolving needs of patients and the healthcare industry.


Sister Louise Steyn has 47 years of experience and started her nursing career in 1977. She completed a number of courses and underwent rigorous training in nursing, pharmacology and forensics.

She established her first clinic in Mpumalanga, from where she later served at Gariep Dam's state clinic. In George, she expanded her services to Pick n Pay Pharmacy and the Easycare Clinic.

Now, as a new chapter begins at The Local Choice clinic, her commitment to care continues and visitors are invited to witness her dedication first-hand.

The Local Choice Pharmacy has a friendly family feel and is located on the corner of Courtenay and Wellington streets (old Top DVD).


> Convenient trading hours


- Monday to Friday: 08:00 - 18:00
- Saturday: 08:00 - 13:00 & 16:00 - 18:00
- Sunday: 10:00 - 12:00 & 16:00 - 18:00

Where to find us

- Location: 38 Courtenay Street (Old Top DVD)
- Phone: 044 868 0142
- Email: [email protected]
- Website: www.thelocalchoice.co.za

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
